ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "package_size" TEXT /* Size of the package (number of soft tabs) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the package */,
  "price_per_tab" REAL /* Price per individual soft tab */,
  "savings" REAL /* Savings compared to regular price */,
  "bonus_offer" TEXT /* Details of any promotional bonus offers */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the product */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "prescription_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a prescription is required to purchase the product */,
  "available_stock" INTEGER /* Current available stock of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Pain Relief, Antibiotics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's billing address */,
  "is_pharmacy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is for a pharmacy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order for which payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier responsible for shipping (e.g., UPS, FedEx) */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status (e.g., Shipped, Delivered, Returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotional offer */,
  "discount_percent" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to avail the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Customer's comment about the product */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
